codeReview.summary: The implementation adds comprehensive Playwright test coverage for all 9 validation contract assertions (VAL-DEPLOY-002, VAL-CROSS-101–108) covering the browser auth/shell contract. Two test files were added: (1) deploy-readiness-browser-contract.spec.js with 22 tests against the local service stack using the virtual-authenticator harness for passkey ceremonies, and (2) deployed-origin-auth-shell.spec.js with 10 tests against the deployed origin https://draft.choir-ip.com for signed-out behavior verification. The tests are well-structured, use proper data attributes for selectors, and cover all specified observable behaviors including guest auth entry, registration/login flows, cookie-backed transport, renewal/rehydration, logout, user-switch isolation, and failed renewal fallback. A library documentation file was also added documenting the verified state.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The library documentation pattern is working well - the new deploy-readiness-browser-contract.md file effectively documents the verified state of all 9 validation assertions for future workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/deploy-readiness-browser-contract.md: Comprehensive documentation of VAL-DEPLOY-002 through VAL-CROSS-108 with specific test file mappings and notes about Playwright virtual authenticator limitations against deployed HTTPS origins.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The services.yaml already correctly documents the frontend-build and playwright-install/playwright commands that were used by this worker. No new services were introduced.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: services.yaml lines 6-7 define `frontend-build: cd frontend && pnpm build` and lines 9-10 define `frontend-e2e: cd frontend && pnpm exec playwright test --workers=1` which the worker correctly used for verification.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Worker followed the established pattern of using data attributes (e.g., data-auth-entry, data-shell, data-shell-user, data-shell-live-status) for test selectors, consistent with existing Playwright test patterns in the frontend/tests directory.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: frontend/tests/deploy-readiness-browser-contract.spec.js:12-15 uses data attributes like [data-auth-entry], [data-shell], [data-shell-user], [data-shell-live-status] for reliable test selectors.

summary: This feature implementation is comprehensive and correct. The worker followed the frontend-worker skill procedure, added 32 new Playwright test cases covering all 9 validation contract assertions, verified against both local stack and deployed origin using agent-browser, and added clear library documentation. The tests properly use the virtual-authenticator harness for passkey ceremonies and document the limitation that full passkey automation cannot run against the HTTPS deployed origin. No code issues identified. Shared state documentation is well-maintained.
